title: Now Unto the Lord, All You Sons of the Mighty

verses.text: Now unto the LORD, all you sons of the mighty, all glory and strength and dominion accord; ascribe to him glory, and render him honor. In beauty of holiness worship the LORD, in beauty of holiness worship the LORD. St. 1 The Psalter, 1912; alt St. 2-5, Book of Psalms, 1871; alt; rev 2004 used by permission

The voice of the LORD is above all the waters; in thunder the God of all glory draws nigh. Lo, over the waves of the billowing waters the LORD is enthroned in his glory on high! The LORD is enthroned in his glory on high! St. 1 The Psalter, 1912; alt St. 2-5, Book of Psalms, 1871; alt; rev 2004 used by permission

The voice of the LORD is almighty in power; the voice of the LORD in full majesty speaks: the voice of the LORD breaks the Lebanon cedars, and like a young calf he makes Lebanon skip, and like a young ox he makes Sirion leap. St. 1 The Psalter, 1912; alt St. 2-5, Book of Psalms, 1871; alt; rev 2004 used by permission

And all in his temple, in worship, cry "Glory!" The LORD rules the flood and his reign shall ne'er cease. O may the LORD strengthen his people forever: O may the LORD bless all his people with peace! The LORD blesses all of his people with peace! St. 1 The Psalter, 1912; alt St. 2-5, Book of Psalms, 1871; alt; rev 2004 used by permission
